calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Off Calendar

Request For Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:16 am pausing at 9:34 am, resuming at 10:10 am and concluding at 10:22 am.

Plaintiff Headway Capital LLC is represented by Alison Schlick, Esq via zoom video conference.
Defendant Chigbu & Co, LLP. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

BREE GREEN is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Headway Capital LLC and against Defendant Chigbu & Co, LLP. as follows:

1. Damages: $30,670.85
2. Prejudgment Interest: $@10%
3. Costs: $605.00
4. Attorney fees: $2,825.00

Plaintiff's Counsel to submit Proposed judgment. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Continued To Apr-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Request For Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Continued To Feb-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Chibug & Co, LLP, a limited liability partnership and Defendant John Chibug.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:42:21 a.m., and concluding at 9:48:10 a.m. (D505)

Alison Schlick, Esq. representing Plaintiff Headway Capital, LLC a Delaware via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Chibug & Co, LLP, a limited liability partnership and Defendant John Chibug not appearing.

The Court continues the matter for witness for the Plaintiff to appear and to file supplemental declaration of the specific number in damages. The matter is continued to Feb-28-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Continued To Feb-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
